description: Style NoteA traditional and conservative fragrance, first launched in 1966. This has a retro origin but a modern notes that appeal to today's cosmo men as well. This is one of the few fragrances where the accord of leather can be easily recognized the creator of this fragrance is Bernard Chant. Product DetailsThe top notes are artemisia, bergamot, cinnamon, gardenia, with a heart of pelargonium, patchouli, vetiver, sandalwood. The base notes are leather, oak moss, amber.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize60 ml
